# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    # Read input
    N, P, Q = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    D = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
    
    # Calculate minimum cost with coupon
    min_dish_cost = min(D)
    coupon_total = Q + min_dish_cost
    
    # Compare with regular price
    result = min(P, coupon_total)
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
